semantic.role: Test harness for integration testing of the ArchSpine CLI; spawns the built CLI binary in a child process against isolated temporary workspaces.
responsibilities: Provide a `runCli` helper function that executes the built CLI (`dist/cli/index.js`) via `spawnSync` and returns stdout, stderr, and exit status.
Set up temporary test directories using `fs.mkdtempSync` to isolate each test run.
Execute CLI command scenarios (e.g. `init`, `sync`, `build`, `scan`) and assert output correctness and exit codes.
Clean up temporary test artefacts after each test via vitest lifecycle hooks (`afterEach`, `beforeAll`).
Simulate interactive CLI flows if needed by writing input files or using `execFileSync` (e.g., for prompts module).
outOfScope: Not a production or runtime module; does not contribute to the application's public API.
Does not define any exported symbols for external consumption.
Does not implement CLI command logic; only invokes it externally.
invariants: Requires the CLI to be pre-built at `dist/cli/index.js` before test execution.
Assumes `node_modules/prompts` is available for interactive mode simulation.
Test isolation is achieved through unique temporary directories per test.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a black-box integration test suite that validates the compiled CLI behaviour end-to-end in a clean environment.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Updated test suite for security hardening and infrastructure changes.
